description: The chart's title claims to show USA renewable electricity data from 1990–2021, but only the 1990–1998 period is actually displayed — a window during which renewables were essentially flat or slightly declining (from ~2.5% to ~1.1%). This cherry-picked subset hides the dramatic growth from ~2% to ~14% that occurred from 2000 onward, creating the false impression that non-hydro renewable electricity in the USA stagnated or declined over the full 31-year period.
